observations.note: ADR-017 naming convention successfully implemented. Gerund form adopted with prefix removal. Conservative approach minimizes refactoring risk.
Dual-path architecture maintained correctly. Both src/ and .claude/ paths updated synchronously. File counts match (16 files preserved).
Cross-reference sweep complete. skills-reference.md, commands-reference.md, and source-tree.md all updated. No active references to old name remain.
Git history preserved via git mv command. Backup files retained (.backup-2025-12-23/) for reference. Zero data loss.
Backup cleanup opportunity: .backup-2025-12-23/SKILL.md.bak could be archived or removed after release. Low priority housekeeping.
